title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Delhi University Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Delhi University Digital Technologies:
Delhi University Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
